description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a weathered, dark brown finish, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. The box features two cut-out handles on opposite shorter sides, allowing for easy lifting and carrying. The wood grain and surface imperfections are visible, suggesting it has been used or exposed to the elements, which adds to its character. The interior is open and spacious, suitable for holding various items such as tools, supplies, or personal belongings. The box has no lid or closure mechanism, making its contents easily accessible. Its sturdy construction and simple design make it ideal for use in garages, workshops, or urban outdoor settings.
description: A weathered, rectangular wooden storage box with cut-out side handles and an open top, ideal for carrying or storing items. The rustic finish and sturdy build make it suitable for urban or utility environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing a rectangular face with a centered cut-out handle and visible wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a wide, uninterrupted wooden panel with no handles or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with a matching cut-out handle and similar wood texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing a plain wooden panel.
